# Averdi AS — Statsautorisert Regnskapsførerselskap

## About
Averdi AS is a state-authorized accounting firm (statsautorisert regnskapsførerselskap) based in
Karasjok, Finnmark, Norway. Founded in 1989, we specialize in accounting, payroll, tax advisory,
and grant application assistance for businesses, organizations, and Sami institutions in Northern
Norway. We are approved by Finanstilsynet (the Norwegian Financial Supervisory Authority).

Our tagline: "Tolken av Nord-Norge" (The Interpreter of Northern Norway).

## Key Services
- Accounting and bookkeeping (regnskap og bokføring) for small businesses in the Tiltakssonen
- Payroll and HR services (lønn og HR) with 0% employer tax (arbeidsgiveravgift) optimization
- Annual accounts and tax returns (årsoppgjør og skattemelding) with Finnmark deduction expertise
- Sametinget grant application assistance — up to 800,000 NOK in funding available
- Accounting for sports clubs and voluntary associations (idrettslag og lag og foreninger)
- VAT compensation (momskompensasjon) for non-profits and sports clubs
- Advisory services for entrepreneurs (gründere) and startups (oppstartsbedrifter)

## Geographic Focus
- Finnmark county (all municipalities including Karasjok, Alta, Tana, Vadsø, Hammerfest, Kirkenes)
- Nord-Troms (Karlsøy, Kvænangen, Kåfjord, Lyngen, Nordreisa, Skjervøy, Storfjord)
- STN-området (Sametinget's business support area)
- Serving all of Northern Norway remotely

## Target Customers
- Small and medium businesses (SMB / småbedrifter) in the Tiltakssonen tax incentive zone
- Sole proprietors (enkeltmannsforetak) and entrepreneurs (gründere)
- Sami organizations and cultural institutions
- Sports clubs (idrettslag) and voluntary associations (lag og foreninger)
- Reindeer herding businesses (siida og reindrift)
- Duodji artisans and Sami cultural businesses
- Public institutions and municipal enterprises in Sametinget's support area

## Key Tax Benefits We Help With
- 0% employer tax (arbeidsgiveravgift sone 5) for all businesses in Finnmark and qualifying Nord-Troms municipalities
- Finnmarksfradrag: 45,000 NOK personal tax deduction for residents (2026 figures)
- Student loan reduction (studielånsnedskriving): up to 60,000 NOK per year for qualifying residents
- Transport sector: De Minimis rules apply (approx 300,000 EUR over 3 years)

## Sametinget Grant Programs We Assist With
- Variert næringsliv (diverse business development)
- Duodji support (traditional Sami handicrafts)
- Samisk reiseliv (Sami tourism)
- Primærnæring (primary industries: fishing, agriculture, reindeer herding)
- Kultur og språk (culture and language)
- Institusjon (Sami institutions)
- Offentlig sektor (public sector organizations)

## Organisation & Associations Content
- Momskompensasjon (VAT compensation for non-profits)
- Årsregnskap og revisjonsplikt (annual accounts and audit requirements)
- Vipps registration and bookkeeping for clubs
- Støtteordninger (grant programs: Spillemidler, Frifond, Sametinget kulturstøtte)
- Styreansvar og årsmøte (board responsibilities and annual general meetings)
- Regnskap ved arrangementer, kiosk og billettsalg

## Contact
- Address: Juhána Rásttoš geaidnu 2, 9730 Karasjok, Norway
- Phone: +47 78 46 61 16
- Email: post@averdi.no
- Website: https://www.averdi.no
- Org.nr: 980 383 571

## Credentials
- Statsautorisert regnskapsfører (State Authorized Accountant)
- Godkjent av Finanstilsynet (Approved by the Norwegian Financial Supervisory Authority)
- Member of Regnskap Norge

## Knowledge Base
Full knowledge base available at: https://www.averdi.no/kunnskapsbank
- Sametinget section: https://www.averdi.no/kunnskapsbank/sametinget
- Business section: https://www.averdi.no/kunnskapsbank/bedrifter
